name: family_swap
desc: Swap a family instance to another family or family type. The element must be a family instance; the target family and type must already be loaded in the document. Use list_families to discover loaded families and types.

parameters.name: element_id
parameters.description: Element ID of the family instance to swap (integer as string).

parameters.name: family_name
parameters.description: Target family name (must be loaded in the document).

parameters.name: type_name
parameters.description: Target type name within the family (optional; if omitted, first type is used).
